def_en: To succeed in doing or completing something
quote_en: I felt proud when I finally accomplished my science project after working on it for two weeks.
quote_zh: 当我花了两周时间终于完成科学作业时，我感到非常自豪。
ex_en: Every big dream starts with small steps—when you accomplish one goal, you prove to yourself that you can reach the next one too.
ex_zh: 每一个伟大的梦想都始于小小的步伐——当你完成一个目标时，你就是在向自己证明，下一个目标你也能够实现。

def_en: A mixture or joining of two or more things
quote_en: The perfect combination of teamwork and practice helped our class win the relay race.
quote_zh: 团队合作与练习的完美结合帮助我们班赢得了接力赛。
ex_en: Life is a beautiful combination of effort and patience—give both your best, and wonderful things will grow.
ex_zh: 生活是努力与耐心的美好结合——把两者都做到最好，美好的事物就会生长出来。

def_en: Extremely important or necessary
quote_en: Remembering to bring my homework was crucial because the teacher said it counted toward our final grade.
quote_zh: 记得带上作业至关重要，因为老师说这会计入期末成绩。
ex_en: Small choices you make every day—like being kind or working hard—are crucial steps on the path to becoming the person you want to be.
ex_zh: 你每天做出的微小选择——比如善待他人或努力学习——都是通往你想成为的那个人的关键步伐。

def_en: To make an exact copy of something
quote_en: I used the school printer to duplicate my drawing so I could give one copy to my grandma and keep one for myself.
quote_zh: 我用学校的打印机复制了我的画，这样我就可以送给奶奶一张，自己留一张。
ex_en: You don't need to duplicate someone else's success—your own unique path will lead you to achievements that no one else can copy.
ex_zh: 你不需要复制别人的成功——属于你自己的独特道路，会带你抵达别人无法复制的成就。

def_en: To come out or appear from a hidden place
quote_en: The shy boy slowly began to emerge as a confident leader during our group projects.
quote_zh: 那个害羞的男孩在小组活动中慢慢展现出自信的领导者风范。
ex_en: Just like a butterfly must emerge from its cocoon, your greatest strengths often emerge when you face challenges with courage.
ex_zh: 就像蝴蝶必须破茧而出一样，你最强大的力量往往在你勇敢面对挑战时才会展现出来。

def_en: Not relying on others; able to do things for yourself
quote_en: I became more independent when I started walking to school by myself this year.
quote_zh: 今年我开始自己走路去上学，变得更独立了。
ex_en: Being independent doesn't mean doing everything alone—it means knowing when to trust yourself and when to ask for help.
ex_zh: 独立并不意味着凡事都独自完成——它意味着懂得何时相信自己，何时寻求帮助。

def_en: To succeed in dealing with or controlling a problem
quote_en: With help from my friends, I was able to overcome my fear of speaking in front of the class.
quote_zh: 在朋友们的帮助下，我克服了在全班同学面前发言的恐惧。
ex_en: Every time you overcome a challenge, you grow a little stronger—like a tree that stands firm after a storm.
ex_zh: 每当你克服一个挑战，你都会变得更强壮一些——就像暴风雨后依然挺立的大树。

def_en: Strange or unusual
quote_en: My dog has a peculiar habit of chasing his own tail whenever he gets excited.
quote_zh: 我的狗有一个奇怪的习惯，一兴奋就会追着自己的尾巴跑。
ex_en: What makes you peculiar is what makes you special—embrace the things that set you apart from everyone else.
ex_zh: 让你显得独特的地方，正是让你与众不同的地方——拥抱那些让你脱颖而出的特质。

def_en: To confuse or puzzle someone greatly
quote_en: The tricky riddle my brother gave me completely perplexed me for almost an hour.
quote_zh: 哥哥给我的那个 tricky 谜语让我困惑了将近一个小时。
ex_en: When something perplexes you, don't give up—asking questions is how curious minds grow.
ex_zh: 当遇到让你困惑的事情时，不要放弃——提出问题正是好奇的头脑成长的方式。

def_en: Small in number or amount; thinly scattered
quote_en: The attendance was sparse on the rainy day, with only half the class showing up.
quote_zh: 下雨天出勤率很低，只有半个班的学生来了。
ex_en: A forest starts with sparse seeds—but with time and care, it becomes a place of abundance.
ex_zh: 森林始于稀疏的种子——但经过时间的浇灌和精心的呵护，它会变成一片丰茂之地。

def_en: To signal or call someone with a gesture
quote_en: My friend beckoned me to come sit next to her when she saved me a seat in the cafeteria.
quote_zh: 我的朋友在食堂帮我留了座位，招手叫我过去坐。
ex_en: Opportunities often beckon quietly—pay attention, and be brave enough to step forward when they call.
ex_zh: 机会常常悄无声息地招手——用心留意，当它们呼唤时，要勇敢地走上前去。

def_en: To give something as an honor or gift
quote_en: The principal will bestow the Good Citizen award to the student who helped the elderly neighbor.
quote_zh: 校长将把好公民奖授予那位帮助了年迈邻居的学生。
ex_en: The greatest gift you can bestow upon others is your kindness—it costs nothing but means everything.
ex_zh: 你能给予他人的最珍贵的礼物就是你的善意——它无需分文，却意义非凡。

def_en: A difficult task or problem that tests someone's abilities
quote_en: Learning to play the recorder was a challenge at first, but I kept practicing every day.
quote_zh: 一开始学吹竖笛是个挑战，但我每天都坚持练习。
ex_en: A challenge is not a wall to stop you—it's a mountain that shows you how strong you can become.
ex_zh: 挑战不是阻挡你的高墙，而是一座山峰，让你看见自己能变得多么强大。

def_en: To become smaller or less
quote_en: The number of mistakes in my spelling test decreased after I started reviewing my words each night.
quote_zh: 自从我开始每晚复习单词后，拼写测试中的错误减少了。
ex_en: Worries decrease when you share them with someone who cares—a problem shared is a problem halved.
ex_zh: 当你与关心你的人分享烦恼时，烦恼就会减少——一份烦恼与人分担，就只剩下一半了。

def_en: Absolutely necessary; extremely important
def_zh: 必不可少的；非常重要的
quote_en: Water and healthy food are essential for staying strong and focused during the school day.
quote_zh: 水和健康的食物对于在上学期间保持精力充沛和注意力集中至关重要。
ex_en: Practice is essential for growth—every master was once a beginner who refused to give up.
ex_zh: 练习对于成长至关重要——每一位大师都曾是拒绝放弃的初学者。

def_en: Extremely large; huge
quote_en: The gigantic oak tree in our schoolyard provides shade for everyone during summer sports.
quote_zh: 我们校园里那棵巨大的橡树在夏天运动时为大家提供了阴凉。
ex_en: Even the most gigantic achievements start with one small, brave step forward.
ex_zh: 即使是最巨大的成就，也始于一个微小而勇敢的前行。

def_en: With close attention; in a focused way
quote_en: The whole class listened intently as the author read an excerpt from her new book.
quote_zh: 全班同学都专心地听着那位作家朗读她新书中的选段。
ex_en: When you listen intently, you show respect—and you often learn something you would have otherwise missed.
ex_zh: 当你专注地倾听时，你既表达了尊重，也常常能学到原本会错过的宝贵知识。

def_en: Not thinking too highly of oneself; humble or not large in size
quote_en: Even though she won the spelling bee, she remained modest and congratulated the other competitors.
quote_zh: 尽管她赢得了拼写比赛，她依然保持谦虚，并向其他参赛者表示祝贺。
ex_en: A modest heart leaves room to grow—there is always something new to learn from others.
ex_zh: 谦虚的心为成长留出了空间——从他人身上总有新东西值得学习。

def_en: To look like or be similar to someone or something
quote_en: Many people say I resemble my dad because we both have curly hair and a big smile.
quote_zh: 很多人都说我长得像爸爸，因为我们都有卷卷的头发和灿烂的笑容。
ex_en: You don't need to resemble anyone else to be wonderful—being yourself is more than enough.
ex_zh: 你不需要像其他任何人才能变得优秀——做你自己就已经足够美好。

def_en: Serious and dignified; not cheerful or playful
quote_en: The class grew solemn when we learned that our beloved janitor was retiring after 30 years.
quote_zh: 当我们得知敬爱的校工工作了三十年后要退休时，全班都变得严肃起来。
ex_en: There is strength in solemn moments—they remind us to be grateful for what truly matters.
ex_zh: 庄严的时刻蕴含着力量——它们提醒我们珍惜真正重要的人和事。

def_en: Correct and exact; with no mistakes
quote_en: My prediction about the soccer game winner was accurate—our team scored in the last minute.
quote_zh: 我对足球比赛获胜者的预测很准确——我们队在最后一分钟进球了。
ex_en: Being accurate matters, but so does trying—mistakes are simply steps toward getting it right.
ex_zh: 做到准确很重要，但勇于尝试同样重要——错误只是通向正确的阶梯。

def_en: The customs, arts, and way of life of a particular group
quote_en: Our school celebrates different cultures by having families share traditional food and stories.
quote_zh: 我们学校通过邀请家庭分享传统食物和故事来庆祝不同的文化。
ex_en: Every culture has something beautiful to teach us—curiosity about others makes the world a kinder place.
ex_zh: 每一种文化都有美好的东西可以教给我们——对他人的好奇让世界变得更加友善。

def_en: To take someone's attention away from what they are doing
quote_en: The noise from the construction outside tried to distract me, but I focused on finishing my math test.
quote_zh: 外面施工的噪音试图分散我的注意力，但我还是专注于完成数学考试。
ex_en: Don't let small things distract you from your big dreams—keep your eyes on where you want to go.
ex_zh: 不要让琐事分散你对大梦想的注意力——把目光锁定在你想要抵达的地方。

def_en: Happening often or regularly
quote_en: After frequent practice sessions, I finally learned to ride my bike without training wheels.
quote_zh: 经过频繁的练习，我终于学会了不用辅助轮骑自行车。
ex_en: Frequent effort, even when small, adds up to something remarkable over time.
ex_zh: 频繁的努力，即使每次都很微小，日积月累也会成就非凡。

def_en: To pause before doing something because of uncertainty
quote_en: I started to hesitate before raising my hand, but then I remembered that my answer might help the class.
quote_zh: 举手前我有些犹豫，但随后想起自己的答案可能会帮助到全班同学。
ex_en: Don't hesitate to share your ideas—your voice has value, and someone might need to hear it.
ex_zh: 不要犹豫去分享你的想法——你的声音很有价值，也许正有人需要听到它。

def_en: To make someone extremely angry
quote_en: It would infuriate me when my little brother borrowed my colored pencils without asking.
quote_zh: 弟弟不问我一声就借走我的彩笔时，总会让我很生气。
ex_en: When something infuriates you, take a deep breath—calm words speak louder than angry shouts.
ex_zh: 当有事情让你愤怒时，深呼吸一下——平静的话语比愤怒的喊叫更有力量。

def_en: The number of people living in a place
quote_en: The population of our town has grown so much that we are getting a new school next year.
quote_zh: 我们镇的人口增长了很多，明年要建一所新学校。
ex_en: Every person in a population has a unique gift to offer—a community grows stronger when everyone contributes.
ex_zh: 人口中的每一个人都有独特的天赋可以奉献——当每个人都贡献力量时，社区就会变得更强大。

def_en: Having a sensible and practical view of what is possible
quote_en: My goal of reading twenty books this year is realistic because I read one book every two weeks.
quote_zh: 我今年读二十本书的目标很现实，因为我每两周就能读完一本。
ex_en: Dream big, but set realistic steps along the way—small victories build the path to great success.
ex_zh: 大胆梦想，但沿途设定切实可行的步伐——小小的胜利铺就通往巨大成功的道路。

def_en: Something that can be used to help achieve a goal
quote_en: The school library is my favorite resource for finding interesting books about space and planets.
quote_zh: 学校图书馆是我最喜欢的资源，可以找到关于太空和行星的有趣书籍。
ex_en: Your greatest resource is your own curiosity—it will guide you to learn anything you wish to know.
ex_zh: 你最宝贵的资源是你自己的好奇心——它会引导你学会任何你想了解的知识。

def_en: To grow, develop, or succeed strongly
quote_en: My tomato plants thrive in the sunny spot by our classroom window.
quote_zh: 我的番茄植物在教室窗边阳光充足的地方茁壮成长。
ex_en: When you surround yourself with encouraging people, you will thrive in ways you never imagined.
ex_zh: 当你身边围绕着鼓励你的人时，你会以从未想象过的方式茁壮成长。

def_en: To tell someone something positively to remove doubt or worry
quote_en: My teacher assured me that it was okay to make mistakes because that's how we learn.
quote_zh: 老师向我保证犯错误没关系，因为我们就是这样学习的。
ex_en: When you assure a friend that they are not alone, you give them a gift stronger than any object.
ex_zh: 当你向朋友保证他们并不孤单时，你送给他们的礼物比任何物品都更珍贵。

def_en: To understand something fully
quote_en: It took me a few tries to comprehend the instructions for the science experiment.
quote_zh: 我试了好几次才理解科学实验的步骤说明。
ex_en: To comprehend something new, you must first be brave enough to admit you don't yet know it.
ex_zh: 要理解新的事物，首先要勇敢承认自己还不太明白。

def_en: To set up or create something that lasts
quote_en: Our class decided to establish a recycling program to help keep our school clean.
quote_zh: 我们班决定建立一个回收计划来帮助保持校园整洁。
ex_en: Good habits you establish today will serve you well for the rest of your life.
ex_zh: 你今天建立的好习惯，将为你的一生带来益处。

def_en: To describe something as larger or greater than it really is
quote_en: My brother tends to exaggerate when he tells stories about his fishing adventures.
quote_zh: 我哥哥讲钓鱼冒险故事时总喜欢夸张。
ex_en: You never need to exaggerate your worth—who you truly are is already enough.
ex_zh: 你永远不需要夸大自己的价值——真实的你，已经足够好。

def_en: Lacking knowledge or awareness about something
quote_en: I was ignorant about how to care for a pet hamster until I read a book about it.
quote_zh: 在读了一本书之前，我对如何照顾宠物仓鼠一无所知。
ex_en: Being ignorant isn't a weakness—it's an invitation to learn something new every day.
ex_zh: 无知不是弱点——它是邀请你每天学习新事物的请柬。

def_en: Extremely large or great
quote_en: The immense whale at the museum exhibit made me feel tiny standing next to it.
quote_zh: 博物馆展览中那头巨大的鲸鱼让我站在旁边时感觉自己很渺小。
ex_en: You have immense potential within you—sometimes it just takes time and patience to discover it.
ex_zh: 你体内蕴藏着巨大的潜力——有时只是需要时间和耐心去发现它。

def_en: A difficult or painful experience
quote_en: The spelling test felt like an ordeal, but I was relieved when I saw my good grade.
quote_zh: 那次拼写测试感觉像一场磨难，但看到好成绩时我松了一口气。
ex_en: Every ordeal you survive makes you stronger and wiser than you were before.
ex_zh: 你经历的每一次磨难，都会让你比从前更坚强、更睿智。

def_en: A careful plan or method for achieving something
quote_en: My strategy for the math competition was to solve the easier problems first to build confidence.
quote_zh: 我参加数学竞赛的策略是先解出简单的问题来建立信心。
ex_en: A good strategy can help you overcome obstacles—but flexibility matters too, because plans can change.
ex_zh: 好的策略能帮你克服困难——但灵活应变同样重要，因为计划总会变化。

def_en: To gather or call forth something, especially courage or strength
quote_en: I had to summon all my courage to ask the principal if I could start a book club.
quote_zh: 我必须鼓起全部勇气去问校长我是否可以创办一个读书俱乐部。
ex_en: You can always summon strength you didn't know you had—it lives inside you, waiting to be found.
ex_zh: 你总能召唤出自己都未曾意识到的力量——它就住在你心里，等待被发掘。

def_en: To tease or mock someone in a cruel way
quote_en: The older kids would taunt me for wearing glasses until my friend stood up for me.
quote_zh: 大一点的孩子会因为我戴眼镜而嘲笑我，直到我的朋友站出来替我说话。
ex_en: A kind heart does not taunt—it lifts others up, because true strength is gentle.
ex_zh: 善良的心不会嘲弄他人——它会帮助别人站起来，因为真正的力量是温柔的。

def_en: Something accomplished through effort and skill
quote_en: Winning the school science fair was my biggest achievement this year.
quote_zh: 赢得学校科学展览是我今年最大的成就。
ex_en: Every achievement, big or small, is proof that effort turns dreams into reality.
ex_zh: 每一项成就，无论大小，都证明了努力能将梦想变为现实。

def_en: To create or write something, such as music or a piece of writing
quote_en: For our music class, we had to compose a short melody using only three notes.
quote_zh: 音乐课上，我们只用三个音符创作了一段短小的旋律。
ex_en: You compose your own life story every day—make each chapter one you'll be proud to read.
ex_zh: 你每天都在谱写自己的人生故事——让每一个篇章都值得你骄傲地回读。

def_en: Very unusual or remarkable
quote_en: The firefighter who rescued the kitten from the tall tree did an extraordinary thing.
quote_zh: 那位消防员从高高的大树上救下小猫，做了一件非凡的事。
ex_en: You don't need to be perfect to be extraordinary—you just need to try your best with a kind heart.
ex_zh: 你不需要完美才能变得非凡——你只需要以善良的心全力以赴。

def_en: To stare with an open mouth in surprise or wonder
quote_en: We could only gape in amazement when the magician made a coin disappear right before our eyes.
quote_zh: 当魔术师在我们眼前把一枚硬币变没时，我们都目瞪口呆。
ex_en: Sometimes life will leave you to gape in wonder—those moments of awe remind you how beautiful the world is.
ex_zh: 有时生活会让你惊叹得目瞪口呆——那些充满敬畏的时刻，提醒你世界有多么美好。

def_en: Full of joy and delight
quote_en: The children were gleeful when they saw the first snowfall of the winter.
quote_zh: 孩子们看到冬天的第一场雪时欣喜若狂。
ex_en: A gleeful heart makes even ordinary days feel like celebrations—share your joy and watch it multiply.
ex_zh: 欢喜的心让平凡的日子也像庆典——分享你的快乐，看着它成倍增长。

def_en: To recognize or name someone or something
quote_en: I can identify different bird species by listening to their songs in the park.
quote_zh: 我可以通过听公园里鸟儿的叫声来辨认不同的种类。
ex_en: When you can identify what makes you happy, you've found a compass for your life.
ex_zh: 当你能够辨认出让自己快乐的事物时，你就找到了人生的指南针。

def_en: To convince someone to do or believe something
quote_en: I tried to persuade my parents to get a puppy by showing them how responsible I could be.
quote_zh: 我试图说服父母养一只小狗，向他们展示我可以多么负责任。
ex_en: The best way to persuade others is not with loud words, but with kind actions that show you care.
ex_zh: 说服他人最好的方式不是响亮的话语，而是用善意的行动表明你的关心。

def_en: To say what will happen in the future
quote_en: It's hard to predict whether it will rain tomorrow, so I always keep an umbrella in my bag.
quote_zh: 很难预测明天是否会下雨，所以我总是把伞放在书包里。
ex_en: You cannot predict every twist in your journey—but you can predict that trying your best will always be worthwhile.
ex_zh: 你无法预测人生旅途中的每一个转折——但你可以预测，全力以赴永远值得。

def_en: To allow something to happen without complaining; to put up with
quote_en: I can tolerate spicy food much better now than I could at the beginning of the year.
quote_zh: 比起年初，我现在更能吃辣了。
ex_en: Kind people learn to tolerate differences—they know that the world is more beautiful when everyone belongs.
ex_zh: 善良的人学会包容差异——他们明白，当每个人都拥有归属感时，世界才更加美丽。

def_en: Not clear or exact
quote_en: The instructions for the art project were vague, so I asked the teacher to explain again.
quote_zh: 美术作业的说明很模糊，所以我请老师再解释一遍。
ex_en: When your path feels vague, take one small step—clarity often comes as you move forward.
ex_zh: 当你的道路感觉模糊不清时，先迈出一小步——当你向前走时，清晰往往随之而来。

def_en: To say something suddenly without thinking
quote_en: I didn't mean to blurt out the answer, but I was so excited that I knew it.
quote_zh: 我不是故意脱口说出答案的，只是太兴奋了，因为我真的知道。
ex_en: Before you blurt something out, take one breath—kind words spoken at the right time can make a big difference.
ex_zh: 在你脱口而出之前，先深呼吸一下——在恰当的时机说出的善意话语，能带来很大的不同。

def_en: To point out faults or express disapproval
quote_en: It's easier to criticize someone's work than to appreciate the effort they put into it.
quote_zh: 批评别人的作品比欣赏他们付出的努力更容易。
ex_en: Instead of criticizing, try encouraging—a few kind words can help someone grow more than a hundred complaints.
ex_zh: 与其批评，不如尝试鼓励——几句善意的话语比一百句抱怨更能帮助他人成长。

def_en: Weakly made; easily broken or damaged
quote_en: My first paper airplane was too flimsy to fly, so I used thicker paper for the next one.
quote_zh: 我做的第一只纸飞机太单薄飞不起来，所以第二只用更厚的纸来做。
ex_en: A flimsy excuse might get you out of trouble, but honesty builds trust that lasts a lifetime.
ex_zh: 一个站不住脚的借口或许能帮你暂时摆脱麻烦，但诚实能建立持续一生的信任。

def_en: Lucky; having good fortune
quote_en: I felt fortunate to have such helpful classmates when I was sick and missed a week of school.
quote_zh: 我很幸运有这样乐于助人的同学，在我生病缺课一周时帮助我。
ex_en: The most fortunate people are not those who have the most, but those who appreciate what they have.
ex_zh: 最幸运的人不是拥有最多的人，而是懂得珍惜已有之物的人。

def_en: To light up or make something clearer
quote_en: The street lamps illuminate the path so I can walk home safely after dark.
quote_zh: 路灯照亮了道路，让我在天黑后能安全走回家。
ex_en: A good book can illuminate ideas you never thought of before, opening doors in your mind.
ex_zh: 一本好书能照亮你从未想过的想法，为你打开心灵之门。

def_en: To plan or mean to do something
quote_en: I intend to practice the piano every day so I can play a song for my grandmother's birthday.
quote_zh: 我打算每天练习钢琴，这样就能在奶奶生日时为她弹奏一首歌。
ex_en: What you intend matters, but what you do matters more—good intentions grow into great actions.
ex_zh: 你的意图很重要，但你的行动更重要——好的意图会成长为伟大的行动。

def_en: To copy or imitate someone or something
quote_en: My little sister loves to mimic the way I talk, which can be annoying but also funny.
quote_zh: 我的小妹妹喜欢模仿我说话的样子，虽然有点烦但也很有趣。
ex_en: Don't just mimic others—find your own voice, because no one else can be you as well as you can.
ex_zh: 不要只是模仿别人——找到你自己的声音，因为没有人能比你做得更好。

def_en: To mock or make fun of someone in a cruel way
quote_en: No one should ridicule another person for asking questions—that's how we all learn.
quote_zh: 没有人应该因为别人提问而嘲笑对方——我们都是这样学习的。
ex_en: Those who ridicule others often hide their own fears—true confidence lifts people up.
ex_zh: 嘲笑他人的人往往是在隐藏自己的恐惧——真正的自信是帮助别人成长。

def_en: A distinguishing quality or characteristic
quote_en: One trait I admire in my best friend is her honesty—she always tells me the truth kindly.
quote_zh: 我最欣赏好朋友的一个特质就是她的诚实——她总是善意地告诉我真相。
ex_en: Kindness is a trait that costs nothing to give but becomes priceless to those who receive it.
ex_zh: 善良是一种给予时无需成本、却对接受者而言无比珍贵的品质。

def_en: To speak or say something aloud
quote_en: I was so nervous that I couldn't utter a single word during my presentation.
quote_zh: 我太紧张了，演讲时一句话都说不出来。
ex_en: When you utter words of encouragement, you plant seeds of courage that grow in someone's heart.
ex_zh: 当你说出鼓励的话语时，你就在别人心中种下了勇气的种子。

def_en: To change or adapt something slightly
quote_en: It took me a few weeks to adjust to wearing glasses, but now I don't even notice them.
quote_zh: 我花了几周时间才适应戴眼镜，但现在我几乎感觉不到它们了。
ex_en: Life often asks you to adjust your plans—flexibility helps you find new paths when old ones change.
ex_zh: 生活常常要求你调整计划——灵活应变能帮你在旧路改变时找到新的方向。

def_en: To agree with or allow something officially
quote_en: My parents approved my idea to raise money for the animal shelter by selling homemade cookies.
quote_zh: 我的父母同意了我通过卖自制饼干为动物收容所筹款的想法。
ex_en: The only approval you truly need is your own when you know you've done your best with a kind heart.
ex_zh: 当你用善良的心尽力而为时，你唯一真正需要的认可就是来自你自己。

def_en: To organize and carry out something
quote_en: Our science class will conduct an experiment to see which plants grow fastest in different lights.
quote_zh: 我们科学课将进行一项实验，观察哪种植物在不同光照下长得最快。
ex_en: Conduct yourself with kindness and honesty, and you will earn respect that no one can take away.
ex_zh: 以善良和诚实为人处世，你将赢得无人能夺走的尊重。

def_en: A disagreement or argument between people
quote_en: My friends had a conflict about which game to play, so we took turns choosing.
quote_zh: 我的朋友们因为玩什么游戏起了争执，于是我们轮流选择。
ex_en: Conflict can be solved when both sides listen—understanding each other is the first step to peace.
ex_zh: 当双方都愿意倾听时，冲突就能解决——互相理解是走向和解的第一步。

def_en: Equal in value, amount, or meaning
quote_en: In our math class, we learned that 100 centimeters is equivalent to one meter.
quote_zh: 在数学课上，我们学到了100厘米等于一米。
ex_en: Hard work is equivalent to progress—every bit of effort moves you closer to your goal.
ex_zh: 努力等同于进步——每一分付出都让你离目标更近一步。

def_en: Probably going to happen or be true
quote_en: It's likely to rain this afternoon, so I packed my umbrella and raincoat.
quote_zh: 今天下午很可能会下雨，所以我带了雨伞和雨衣。
ex_en: You are more likely to succeed when you believe in yourself—confidence opens doors that doubt keeps closed.
ex_zh: 当你相信自己时，你更有可能成功——自信打开门，而怀疑让门紧闭。

def_en: To fail to care for or pay attention to something
quote_en: I promised myself I wouldn't neglect my homework even when there's a new video game to play.
quote_zh: 我向自己保证，即使有新游戏玩，也不会忽视作业。
ex_en: Don't neglect the small acts of kindness—they often mean the most to someone having a hard day.
ex_zh: 不要忽视微小的善意之举——对于正在经历困难的人，它们往往意义非凡。

def_en: Not often; rarely
quote_en: I seldom eat junk food because my mom packs healthy snacks in my lunchbox.
quote_zh: 我很少吃垃圾食品，因为妈妈在我的午餐盒里放了健康的零食。
ex_en: Words of gratitude are seldom wasted—they cost nothing but can make someone's entire day brighter.
ex_zh: 表达感激的话语从不会白费——它们无需分文，却能照亮别人一整天。

def_en: Important or large enough to matter
quote_en: Getting a library card was a significant moment for me—it meant I could borrow any book I wanted.
quote_zh: 办一张借书证对我来说是一个重要的时刻——这意味着我可以借任何我想看的书。
ex_en: Even one person can make a significant difference in the world—never underestimate what you can do.
ex_zh: 即使是一个人也能给世界带来重要的改变——永远不要低估自己的能力。

def_en: Absolutely necessary or essential
quote_en: Water and sleep are vital for growing bodies, which is why I try to drink enough and go to bed early.
quote_zh: 水和睡眠对正在成长的身体至关重要，所以我尽量多喝水、早睡觉。
ex_en: A positive attitude is vital for overcoming challenges—it turns obstacles into opportunities to grow.
ex_zh: 积极的心态对克服挑战至关重要——它能把障碍变成成长的机会。

def_en: To state that something is true without proof
quote_en: My little brother likes to claim that he caught the biggest fish, even though he was napping.
quote_zh: 我的小弟弟喜欢声称他钓到了最大的鱼，尽管他当时在打瞌睡。
ex_en: Instead of making claims you can't back up, let your actions speak for themselves—they never lie.
ex_zh: 与其做出无法证实的声称，不如让你的行动为自己说话——行动从不说谎。

def_en: The circumstances or setting surrounding a situation or word
quote_en: When I didn't understand the word, I looked at the context of the sentence to figure out its meaning.
quote_zh: 当我不理解某个词时，我会看句子的上下文来推测它的意思。
ex_en: Before judging someone, understand their context—everyone has a story you know nothing about.
ex_zh: 在评判别人之前，先了解他们的背景——每个人都有你不了解的故事。

def_en: Scattered pieces of waste or remains
quote_en: After the windstorm, there was debris from branches and leaves all over the playground.
quote_zh: 暴风雨过后，操场上到处都是树枝和树叶的残渣。
ex_en: Clear away the debris of yesterday's mistakes—they don't belong in the path of your future.
ex_zh: 清除昨日错误的碎片——它们不属于你通往未来的道路。

def_en: Strange and frightening
quote_en: The empty school hallway at night looked eerie with only the emergency lights glowing.
quote_zh: 夜晚空荡荡的学校走廊在只有应急灯亮着时显得阴森可怕。
ex_en: What seems eerie at first can become familiar once you understand it—knowledge chases away fear.
ex_zh: 一开始觉得可怕的事物，一旦你理解了就会变得熟悉——知识能驱散恐惧。

def_en: A visual image or design
quote_en: My poster included colorful graphics that showed the life cycle of a butterfly.
quote_zh: 我的海报包含了色彩鲜艳的图形，展示了蝴蝶的生命周期。
ex_en: A picture can be a graphic that tells a story words cannot—creativity has many languages.
ex_zh: 一幅图画可以是讲述文字无法表达的故事的图形——创造力有多种语言。

def_en: To examine or study something carefully
quote_en: Our class had to investigate why some plants grew taller than others in the school garden.
quote_zh: 我们班要调查为什么学校花园里有些植物比其他的长得更高。
ex_en: When you investigate questions you don't understand, you become a detective in the mystery of learning.
ex_zh: 当你调查自己不懂的问题时，你就成了学习之谜中的侦探。

def_en: Not following a regular pattern; uneven
quote_en: The irregular shape of the rock made it perfect for skipping across the water.
quote_zh: 这块石头不规则的形状让它很适合打水漂。
ex_en: Life's path is often irregular—full of twists and turns—but that's what makes the journey interesting.
ex_zh: 人生的道路常常是不规则的——充满了曲折——但这正是旅途有趣之处。

def_en: To make a soft, crackling sound like leaves or paper
quote_en: I could hear the leaves rustle under my feet as I walked through the park.
quote_zh: 我走过公园时，能听到脚下树叶发出的沙沙声。
ex_en: When you rustle up courage to try something new, you discover strengths you never knew you had.
ex_zh: 当你鼓起勇气尝试新事物时，你会发现自己从未意识到的力量。

def_en: Thin and weak-looking
quote_en: The scrawny kitten we found grew into a healthy, fluffy cat after we fed her properly.
quote_zh: 我们发现的那只瘦骨嶙峋的小猫，在我们好好喂养之后长成了一只健康毛茸茸的大猫。
ex_en: A scrawny sapling can grow into a mighty oak—with care and time, even the smallest can become strong.
ex_zh: 一棵瘦弱的小树苗可以长成高大的橡树——只要给予关爱和时间，再渺小的存在也能变得强大。

def_en: Regular payment for work done
quote_en: My older sister saves part of her wage from her part-time job to buy books for the school library.
quote_zh: 我姐姐把兼职工作挣的部分工资存起来，为学校图书馆买书。
ex_en: The wage for hard work is not just money—it's the pride that comes from knowing you earned it.
ex_zh: 辛勤工作的回报不仅仅是金钱——还有知道自己靠努力换来的那份自豪感。

def_en: To influence or cause a change in something
quote_en: The amount of sleep I get really affects how well I do on my spelling tests.
quote_zh: 我睡眠的多少确实会影响我在拼写测试中的表现。
ex_en: Your choices affect more than just you—a single kind act can ripple out and touch many lives.
ex_zh: 你的选择影响的不仅是你自己——一个小小的善意举动可以像涟漪一样扩散，触动许多生命。

def_en: The complete loss of hope
quote_en: Even when I felt despair about learning fractions, my tutor helped me understand step by step.
quote_zh: 即使我对学习分数感到绝望时，我的家教还是一步一步地帮我理解。
ex_en: Despair is a dark cloud that passes—hold on, because sunshine always follows if you wait.
ex_zh: 绝望是一片会飘走的乌云——坚持住，因为只要你等待，阳光总会到来。

def_en: To discover or notice something
quote_en: My dog can detect the sound of my dad's car from three blocks away.
quote_zh: 我的狗能察觉到三个街区外爸爸汽车的声音。
ex_en: Train your eyes to detect small beauties—a dewdrop on a leaf can hold the whole morning's wonder.
ex_zh: 训练你的眼睛去发现微小的美好——叶子上的一滴露珠也能承载整个清晨的奇妙。

def_en: On the outside or coming from outside
quote_en: The external appearance of the old house was worn, but the inside was beautifully renovated.
quote_zh: 那栋老房子的外观很破旧，但里面装修得很漂亮。
ex_en: External things like prizes fade, but who you are inside—your kindness and courage—lasts forever.
ex_zh: 外在的东西如奖杯会褪色，但你内心的品质——你的善良和勇气——会永远存在。

def_en: A small, bright flash of light
quote_en: I saw a gleam of sunlight through the clouds after the storm ended.
quote_zh: 暴风雨过后，我看到一缕阳光透过云层闪烁。
ex_en: There is a gleam of possibility in every challenge—look for it, and you'll find a way forward.
ex_zh: 每一个挑战中都有一丝可能性在闪烁——去寻找它，你就会找到前进的路。

def_en: On the inside; within something
quote_en: My internal excitement grew as the day of the field trip got closer and closer.
quote_zh: 随着郊游的日子越来越近，我内心的兴奋也越来越强烈。
ex_en: True strength comes from internal peace—when you are calm inside, nothing outside can shake you easily.
ex_zh: 真正的力量来自内心的平静——当你内心安宁时，外界的事物就很难轻易动摇你。

def_en: Serious danger
quote_en: The sign warned of peril if we climbed the fence near the construction site.
quote_zh: 警示牌提醒我们如果攀爬工地附近的围栏会有危险。
ex_en: Facing peril with courage doesn't mean you aren't scared—it means you move forward anyway.
ex_zh: 勇敢面对危险并不意味着你不害怕——而是尽管害怕，你仍然继续前行。

def_en: To limit or control something
quote_en: My parents restrict my screen time so I have more hours to play outside and read.
quote_zh: 我的父母限制我看屏幕的时间，这样我就有更多时间在户外玩耍和阅读。
ex_en: Don't restrict your dreams to what seems possible—the impossible just takes a little longer.
ex_zh: 不要把你的梦想限制在看起来可能的事情上——所谓的不可能只是需要多花一点时间。

def_en: Safe and protected
quote_en: I feel secure walking to school because there's always a crossing guard at the busy street.
quote_zh: 我走路去上学时感到很安全，因为在繁忙的街道上总有一位交通协管员。
ex_en: The most secure feeling comes not from locks, but from knowing you have people who care about you.
ex_zh: 最安心的感觉不是来自锁具，而是来自知道有人关心你。

def_en: A brief statement of the main points
quote_en: After finishing each chapter, I wrote a short summary to help me remember what happened.
quote_zh: 每读完一章，我都会写一个简短的总结来帮助我记住故事内容。
ex_en: A summary captures the heart of a story—similarly, your best moments capture the heart of who you are.
ex_zh: 总结抓住了故事的核心——同样，你最美好的时刻也抓住了你内心的本质。

def_en: To gently persuade someone to do something
quote_en: I tried to coax my shy little cousin to join the game by offering to play her favorite card game.
quote_zh: 我试着通过陪表妹玩她最喜欢的纸牌游戏来哄她加入游戏。
ex_en: Patience can coax open the most hesitant heart—a gentle nudge is sometimes all someone needs.
ex_zh: 耐心能打开最犹豫的心扉——有时候，别人需要的只是一个温柔的推动。

def_en: To improve or add value to something
quote_en: Adding colorful pictures will enhance my book report and make it more interesting.
quote_zh: 添加彩色的图画会增强我的读书报告，让它更有趣。
ex_en: Learning new skills doesn't replace who you are—it enhances you, adding new colors to your palette.
ex_zh: 学习新技能不会取代你本来的样子——它会提升你，为你的调色板增添新的色彩。

def_en: To show or display something publicly
quote_en: Our art class will exhibit our paintings in the school hallway for everyone to see.
quote_zh: 我们美术课将在学校走廊展示我们的画作，让所有人都能看到。
ex_en: You exhibit your character not through words, but through how you treat others every single day.
ex_zh: 你展示你的品格不是通过言语，而是通过每天如何对待他人。

def_en: Well-known from previous experience
quote_en: The smell of freshly baked bread was familiar—it reminded me of visiting my grandma.
quote_zh: 新鲜出炉的面包香味很熟悉——让我想起了去看奶奶的时光。
ex_en: Step outside what is familiar once in a while—that's where the greatest discoveries wait.
ex_zh: 偶尔走出熟悉的环境——最伟大的发现就在那里等待着你。

def_en: Fierce, violent, or aggressive
quote_en: The puppy looked ferocious when he growled at the vacuum cleaner, but he was really just scared.
quote_zh: 那只小狗对着吸尘器咆哮时看起来很凶猛，但其实它只是害怕而已。
ex_en: Be ferocious in pursuing your dreams—not by hurting others, but by never giving up on yourself.
ex_zh: 在追求梦想时要充满斗志——不是通过伤害他人，而是通过永不放弃自己。

def_en: Dark and difficult to see through
quote_en: The water in the pond was too murky to see the fish swimming below.
quote_zh: 池塘里的水太浑浊了，看不清游在下面的鱼。
ex_en: When the future seems murky, take one step forward—clarity often comes with movement.
ex_zh: 当未来显得模糊不清时，先迈出一步——清晰往往随着行动而来。

def_en: The result or consequence of something
quote_en: The outcome of our science fair project was better than I expected—we won second place.
quote_zh: 我们科学展项目的结果比我预期的要好——我们获得了第二名。
ex_en: You can't always control the outcome, but you can always control the effort you give.
ex_zh: 你无法总是控制结果，但你可以永远控制自己付出的努力。

def_en: To hold back or control
quote_en: I had to restrain myself from eating all the cookies so there would be enough for my friends.
quote_zh: 我不得不克制自己不要把饼干全吃完，这样才够分给我的朋友们。
ex_en: Learning to restrain impulsive words takes practice—but it's a skill that builds strong friendships.
ex_zh: 学会克制冲动的话语需要练习——但这是一种能建立深厚友谊的技能。

def_en: Feeling or showing sadness
quote_en: I felt sorrowful when my best friend moved away, but we still video chat every week.
quote_zh: 我最好的朋友搬走时我很难过，但我们仍然每周视频通话。
ex_en: Sorrowful moments remind us how much we care—they make us appreciate the people we love even more.
ex_zh: 悲伤的时刻提醒我们有多在乎——它们让我们更加珍惜所爱之人。

def_en: Understanding and sharing another person's feelings
quote_en: My classmates showed sympathy by sending get-well cards when I was home with the flu.
quote_zh: 我因流感在家时，同学们送来了慰问卡表示关心。
ex_en: Sympathy is seeing someone's pain; kindness is doing something to help lighten their load.
ex_zh: 同情是看见别人的痛苦；善良是做一些事情来减轻他们的负担。

def_en: Suitable or proper for the situation
quote_en: Wearing my school uniform was the appropriate choice for the class photo day.
quote_zh: 穿校服是班级拍照日合适的选择。
ex_en: Choosing appropriate words shows respect—speak with kindness, and others will listen more willingly.
ex_zh: 选择恰当的言辞是尊重的表现——用善意的话语表达，别人会更愿意倾听。

def_en: Almost exact but not perfectly accurate
quote_en: The approximate number of books in our classroom library is two hundred.
quote_zh: 我们班级图书角的书大约有两百本。
ex_en: An approximate answer with effort is better than no answer at all—trying matters more than perfection.
ex_zh: 一个付出了努力的近似答案比完全没有答案要好——尝试比完美更重要。

def_en: To bring something to an end; to decide after reasoning
quote_en: We will conclude our unit on space by visiting the science museum next Friday.
quote_zh: 我们将通过下周五参观科学博物馆来结束太空单元的学习。
ex_en: Every ending helps you conclude one chapter so you can begin a new one with fresh energy.
ex_zh: 每一个结束都帮助你完结一个篇章，这样你就能以崭新的能量开启新的旅程。

def_en: To burst out suddenly; to explode
quote_en: Laughter erupted from our classroom when the teacher told a funny joke about a clumsy penguin.
quote_zh: 当老师讲了一个关于笨拙企鹅的笑话时，教室里爆发出阵阵笑声。
ex_en: When emotions erupt, take a breath—calm words can cool what angry shouts might burn.
ex_zh: 当情绪爆发时，深呼吸一下——平静的话语能平息愤怒喊叫可能造成的伤害。

def_en: Serious, harsh, or gloomy
quote_en: The sky looked grim with dark clouds, so we moved our soccer game indoors.
quote_zh: 天空乌云密布，看起来很阴沉，于是我们把足球比赛移到了室内。
ex_en: Even in grim moments, look for a tiny spark of hope—it can grow into the light you need.
ex_zh: 即使在严峻的时刻，也要寻找那一丝希望的火花——它能成长为你需要的光芒。

def_en: To copy someone's actions or speech
quote_en: My little brother tries to imitate my basketball moves, even though he can barely reach the hoop.
quote_zh: 我的小弟弟试图模仿我打篮球的动作，尽管他连篮筐都够不着。
ex_en: It's okay to imitate those you admire—but add your own twist, because you have something unique to share.
ex_zh: 模仿你钦佩的人是可以的——但要加入你自己的特色，因为你有独特的东西可以分享。

def_en: To demand or state firmly
quote_en: My mom insists that I finish my homework before I can play video games.
quote_zh: 我妈妈坚持要我完成作业后才能玩电子游戏。
ex_en: When you insist on doing your best, even on hard days, you build a habit that leads to great things.
ex_zh: 当你坚持全力以赴，即使是在艰难的日子里，你也在养成一种通往伟大的习惯。

def_en: To smile or speak in a mocking or scornful way
quote_en: The older boy would sneer at my drawings until I entered the art competition and won.
quote_zh: 那个大一点的男孩总是嘲笑我的画，直到我参加美术比赛并获奖。
ex_en: A sneer can hurt, but kindness heals—choose to be someone who builds others up instead of tearing them down.
ex_zh: 嘲笑会伤人，但善意能治愈——选择做一个建造他人、而非拆毁他人的人。

def_en: A small bunch or cluster of something
quote_en: A tuft of grass was growing through a crack in the sidewalk, showing how nature finds a way.
quote_zh: 一簇草从人行道的裂缝中长出来，展示着大自然总能找到出路。
ex_en: Like a tuft of grass pushing through concrete, your determination can help you overcome any obstacle.
ex_zh: 就像一簇草从混凝土中钻出来一样，你的决心能帮助你克服任何障碍。

def_en: To undo or untangle; to solve or figure out
quote_en: It took me ten minutes to unravel the tangled knot in my shoelace before gym class.
quote_zh: 我花了十分钟才解开体育课前鞋带上那个缠在一起的结。
ex_en: When problems seem tangled, take time to unravel them slowly—patience solves what rushing cannot.
ex_zh: 当问题看似一团乱麻时，花点时间慢慢解开——耐心能解决急躁无法处理的问题。

def_en: Ready to attack or confront; forceful
quote_en: The aggressive player kept trying to steal the ball, so I learned to protect it better.
quote_zh: 那个好斗的球员一直试图抢断球，于是我学会了更好地保护球。
ex_en: You can be aggressive in chasing your dreams without being aggressive toward people—strength can be kind.
ex_zh: 你可以在追求梦想时充满冲劲，而不对人充满攻击性——力量也可以是温和的。

def_en: Worried or nervous about something
quote_en: I felt anxious before the math test, but deep breaths helped me calm down and focus.
quote_zh: 数学考试前我感到很焦虑，但深呼吸帮助我平静下来集中注意力。
ex_en: Everyone feels anxious sometimes—it's a sign that you care, and courage is moving forward anyway.
ex_zh: 每个人有时都会感到焦虑——这说明你在乎，而勇气就是无论如何都要继续前行。

def_en: Completely confused or puzzled
quote_en: I was bewildered by the complicated instructions for my new board game.
quote_zh: 我被新桌游那复杂的说明弄糊涂了。
ex_en: When you feel bewildered, ask questions—curiosity turns confusion into understanding.
ex_zh: 当你感到困惑时，就提问——好奇心能把困惑变成理解。

def_en: The quality of being kind and giving
quote_en: My friend showed generosity by sharing her lunch with me when I forgot mine.
quote_zh: 我的朋友很大方，在我忘记带午餐时把她的一半分给了我。
ex_en: Generosity isn't about how much you give—it's about the joy in your heart when you share what you have.
ex_zh: 慷慨不在于你给予多少——而在于你分享时所怀的那份喜悦。

def_en: A deep understanding of something
quote_en: Reading the biography gave me insight into how the inventor came up with her ideas.
quote_zh: 读那本传记让我深入了解那位发明家是如何产生灵感的。
ex_en: Every book offers insight into lives different from your own—reading builds understanding and kindness.
ex_zh: 每一本书都提供了解与你不同人生的视角——阅读培养理解与善意。

def_en: Deserving pity; sadly inadequate
quote_en: The pitiful cries of the lost puppy made everyone in the neighborhood search for its owner.
quote_zh: 那只走失小狗可怜的叫声让整个街区的人都在帮它寻找主人。
ex_en: A pitiful moment doesn't define your whole story—tomorrow is a new page waiting to be written.
ex_zh: 一个可怜的时刻并不能定义你的整个人生故事——明天是一页等待书写的新篇章。

def_en: Most important; main; first in order
quote_en: My primary goal this year is to improve my reading skills so I can enjoy longer books.
quote_zh: 我今年的主要目标是提高阅读能力，这样我就能享受更长的书籍。
ex_en: Kindness should be your primary guide—it leads you to choices you'll always be proud of.
ex_zh: 善良应该是你首要的指南——它会引导你做出永远引以为豪的选择。

def_en: Genuine and honest; without pretense
quote_en: A sincere apology from my friend made me feel better after our argument.
quote_zh: 朋友真诚的道歉让我们争吵之后我心里好受多了。
ex_en: A sincere compliment costs nothing but can brighten someone's whole day—share them freely.
ex_zh: 一句真诚的赞美无需分文，却能点亮别人一整天——大方地分享它们吧。

def_en: Slow-moving; lacking energy
quote_en: I felt sluggish in the morning until I ate breakfast and woke up completely.
quote_zh: 早上我还没吃早饭、完全醒来之前，感觉整个人都没精打采的。
ex_en: When you feel sluggish, remember that even the slowest turtle finishes the race—keep going.
ex_zh: 当你感到没精打采时，记住即使最慢的乌龟也能完成比赛——继续前进吧。

def_en: To have a strong desire for something
quote_en: I yearn for the day when I can finally reach the top shelf without asking for help.
quote_zh: 我渴望有一天终于不用求助就能够到最上面的架子。
ex_en: Yearn to learn, yearn to grow—a curious heart will take you places you never imagined.
ex_zh: 渴望学习，渴望成长——一颗好奇的心会带你到达从未想象过的地方。

def_en: To shrink back in fear or embarrassment
quote_en: I cringed when I remembered the time I called my teacher "Mom" in front of the whole class.
quote_zh: 想起那次在全班同学面前把老师叫成“妈妈”时，我尴尬得不行。
ex_en: We all cringe at past mistakes—they're just proof that you're learning and growing every day.
ex_zh: 我们都曾为过去的错误感到尴尬——它们恰恰证明你每天都在学习和成长。

def_en: Sadness or disappointment caused by something unexpected
quote_en: To my dismay, the amusement park was closed just as we arrived at the gate.
quote_zh: 让我失望的是，我们刚到门口，游乐园就关门了。
ex_en: Dismay is temporary—turn it into determination, and you'll find another path to what you want.
ex_zh: 失望是暂时的——把它变成决心，你会找到另一条通往目标的道路。

def_en: Facts or signs that prove something
quote_en: The muddy footprints were evidence that someone had walked through the kitchen.
quote_zh: 泥泞的脚印是有人走过厨房的证据。
ex_en: Kindness leaves evidence too—in the smiles of those you've helped and the warmth you've shared.
ex_zh: 善意也会留下证据——在你帮助过的人的笑容里，在你分享过的温暖中。

def_en: To show or communicate a thought or feeling
quote_en: I used a drawing to express how grateful I was for my teacher's help.
quote_zh: 我用一幅画来表达我对老师帮助的感激之情。
ex_en: Finding healthy ways to express your feelings—through words, art, or music—makes your heart lighter.
ex_zh: 找到健康的方式来表达你的感受——通过言语、艺术或音乐——能让你的心更轻松。

def_en: To lift or pull up something heavy
quote_en: We worked together to hoist the heavy flag to the top of the pole.
quote_zh: 我们齐心协力把那面沉重的旗帜升到了旗杆顶端。
ex_en: When a task is too heavy to hoist alone, ask for help—teamwork turns heavy loads into shared triumphs.
ex_zh: 当一项任务太重无法独自完成时，就寻求帮助——团队合作能把沉重的负担变成共同的胜利。

def_en: To make someone feel ashamed or embarrassed
quote_en: The kind boy never tried to humiliate others when they made mistakes in class.
quote_zh: 那个善良的男孩从不在同学课堂上犯错时让他们难堪。
ex_en: No one deserves to be humiliated—choose to be the person who protects others' dignity, not the one who harms it.
ex_zh: 没有人应该被羞辱——选择做一个保护他人尊严的人，而不是伤害它的人。

def_en: Useful and sensible; related to actual practice
quote_en: My mom gave me practical advice: pack my backpack the night before to save time in the morning.
quote_zh: 妈妈给了我一个实用的建议：前一晚把书包收拾好，这样早上就能省时间。
ex_en: Practical skills like cooking, cleaning, and listening will serve you well for your whole life.
ex_zh: 像做饭、打扫和倾听这样的实用技能，会让你受益终生。

def_en: Small and weak
quote_en: The puny seedling looked fragile, but with water and sunlight it grew taller than me.
quote_zh: 那棵弱小的幼苗看起来很脆弱，但在水和阳光的滋养下，它长得比我还高了。
ex_en: Even a puny start can lead to something mighty—don't underestimate what small beginnings can become.
ex_zh: 即使是再微小的开始，也能成就一番伟业——不要低估小小起点的潜力。

def_en: To flow or spread slowly through small openings
quote_en: Water began to seep through the roof when the rain fell harder than ever.
quote_zh: 雨下得比以往都大时，水开始从屋顶渗进来。
ex_en: Kindness can seep into hearts like sunlight through curtains—a little warmth can change everything.
ex_zh: 善意能像阳光透过窗帘一样渗入心灵——一点温暖就能改变一切。

def_en: Sadly longing for something in the past
quote_en: I felt wistful looking at photos from kindergarten, remembering how much fun we had.
quote_zh: 看着幼儿园的照片时，我有些怀念，想起我们度过的快乐时光。
ex_en: A wistful feeling reminds you of beautiful memories—cherish them, then go make new ones.
ex_zh: 惆怅的心情让你想起美好的回忆——珍惜它们，然后去创造新的回忆吧。

def_en: To examine something in detail to understand it
quote_en: In science class, we had to analyse the results of our experiment and explain what we learned.
quote_zh: 科学课上，我们要分析实验结果并解释我们的发现。
ex_en: When you analyse a problem, you turn confusion into a clear path forward—one step at a time.
ex_zh: 当你分析一个问题时，你就是在把困惑变成清晰的解决路径——一步一步来。

def_en: To suppose something without proof
quote_en: I made the mistake of assuming the test would be easy, so I didn't study enough.
quote_zh: 我犯了一个错误，以为考试很简单，所以没有好好复习。
ex_en: Never assume you know someone's story—listen first, because everyone carries things you can't see.
ex_zh: 永远不要假设你了解别人的故事——先倾听，因为每个人都背负着你无法看见的东西。

def_en: To eat hungrily; to read or absorb quickly
def_zh: 狼吞虎咽；如饥似渴地阅读
quote_en: I was so hungry after swimming that I devoured my sandwich in three bites.
quote_zh: 游泳之后我太饿了，三口就把三明治吞完了。
ex_en: When you find a book you love, devour every page—stories have the power to transport you anywhere.
ex_zh: 当你找到一本喜欢的书时，尽情阅读每一页——故事有能力将你带往任何地方。

def_en: Feeling jealous of someone else's good fortune
quote_en: I felt envious when my friend showed me her new bike, but then she let me ride it.
quote_zh: 朋友向我展示她的新自行车时我有些羡慕，但后来她让我骑了。
ex_en: Instead of feeling envious, celebrate others' successes—their happiness doesn't take anything away from you.
ex_zh: 与其感到嫉妒，不如为他人的成功喝彩——他们的快乐并不会从你这里夺走任何东西。

def_en: To have an effect on someone or something
quote_en: My older cousin's love for reading influenced me to try new kinds of books.
quote_zh: 我表哥对阅读的热爱影响了我去尝试不同类型的书。
ex_en: Your choices influence more than you know—be the kind of influence that makes the world a little brighter.
ex_zh: 你的选择影响的范围远比你想象的要广——成为那种让世界更明亮一点的影响力吧。

def_en: To forbid something by rule or law
quote_en: School rules prohibit running in the hallways to keep everyone safe.
quote_zh: 校规禁止在走廊里奔跑，以保障每个人的安全。
ex_en: Don't let fear prohibit you from trying new things—courage grows when you step outside your comfort zone.
ex_zh: 不要让恐惧阻止你尝试新事物——当你走出舒适区时，勇气就会生长。

def_en: To ask about someone's private business; to force open
quote_en: I didn't want to pry, so I waited for my friend to tell me what was bothering her.
quote_zh: 我不想打探隐私，所以等着朋友自己告诉我她在烦恼什么。
ex_en: A good friend knows when to listen and when not to pry—respecting boundaries builds trust.
ex_zh: 好朋友懂得何时倾听、何时不打探——尊重界限才能建立信任。

def_en: To remember something from the past
quote_en: I tried to recall where I had put my library book, and finally remembered it was under my bed.
quote_zh: 我努力回忆把图书馆的书放在哪里了，最后想起它在床底下。
ex_en: When you recall a kind act someone did for you, let it inspire you to pass that kindness forward.
ex_zh: 当你回忆起别人对你的善意之举时，让它激励你把这善意传递下去。

def_en: A feeling of sadness about something done or not done
quote_en: My biggest regret was not trying out for the school play—next year I will be brave.
quote_zh: 我最大的遗憾是没有去参加学校话剧的选拔——明年我一定会勇敢。
ex_en: Live so that your regrets are few—take chances, speak kindly, and always try your best.
ex_zh: 让自己的遗憾尽量少一些——抓住机会，言语友善，永远全力以赴。

def_en: To twist and squeeze; to get something with effort
quote_en: I had to wring out my wet swimsuit before putting it in my bag.
quote_zh: 我得把湿泳衣拧干才能放进包里。
ex_en: You may wring your hands with worry, but action solves more than worry ever will—take one small step.
ex_zh: 你可能会焦虑地绞着双手，但行动比担忧更能解决问题——迈出一小步吧。

def_en: To tell someone a secret or private matter
quote_en: I knew I could confide in my best friend because she always keeps my secrets safe.
quote_zh: 我知道可以向最好的朋友倾诉心事，因为她总是替我保守秘密。
ex_en: Being someone others can confide in is a gift—it means you've earned their trust through your kindness.
ex_zh: 成为别人可以倾诉的对象是一种礼物——这意味着你通过善意赢得了他们的信任。

def_en: To fear something that is going to happen
quote_en: I used to dread giving speeches, but practicing in front of my family made it easier.
quote_zh: 我以前很害怕演讲，但在家人面前练习之后变得容易多了。
ex_en: Don't dread challenges—embrace them as chances to discover how strong you really are.
ex_zh: 不要畏惧挑战——把它们当作发现自己真正有多强大的机会。

def_en: A brief or partial view
quote_en: I caught a glimpse of a deer in the woods before it disappeared behind the trees.
quote_zh: 我在树林里瞥见一只鹿，然后它就消失在树丛后面了。
ex_en: Every book gives you a glimpse into someone else's world—reading builds bridges between hearts.
ex_zh: 每一本书都让你得以一窥他人的世界——阅读在心灵之间架起桥梁。

def_en: To shine with a sparkling light
quote_en: The morning dew made the spider web glisten like diamonds in the sunlight.
quote_zh: 清晨的露水让蜘蛛网在阳光下像钻石一样闪耀。
ex_en: After the rain, everything glistens—sometimes beauty appears after the hardest storms.
ex_zh: 雨后，万物都闪闪发光——有时候，美丽在最大的风雨之后才会出现。

def_en: To set apart or separate from others
quote_en: When I had a cold, I had to isolate myself so I wouldn't spread germs to my classmates.
quote_zh: 我感冒时不得不把自己隔离起来，以免把病菌传染给同学。
ex_en: When you feel isolated, reach out—connection is just a kind word or a listening ear away.
ex_zh: 当你感到孤立时，伸出手去寻求连接——一段善意的话语或一双倾听的耳朵就能带来连接。

def_en: A choice or alternative
quote_en: For our project, we had the option to make a poster, build a model, or give a presentation.
quote_zh: 对于我们的作业，我们可以选择制作海报、搭建模型或者做演讲。
ex_en: When life gives you options, choose the one that makes you proud—not just the easiest path.
ex_zh: 当生活给你选项时，选择那个让你感到自豪的——而不仅仅是那条最简单的路。

def_en: A short section from a book; a way through
quote_en: The passage from our reading book described a magical forest full of talking animals.
quote_zh: 我们阅读书中的那个段落描绘了一片充满会说话动物的魔法森林。
ex_en: Every passage you read adds a new room to the house of your imagination—fill it with stories.
ex_zh: 你阅读的每一个段落都为你想象力的房子增添一个新的房间——用故事填满它吧。

def_en: To smile in an annoying or smug way
quote_en: The bully would smirk when he thought he had tricked someone, but his jokes weren't funny.
quote_zh: 那个霸凌者觉得捉弄了别人时就会得意地笑，但他的玩笑一点儿都不好笑。
ex_en: A smirk may seem clever, but a genuine smile costs nothing and spreads real joy.
ex_zh: 得意的笑也许显得聪明，但真诚的微笑无需代价，却能传播真正的快乐。

def_en: Extremely large in size or extent
quote_en: The vast library had so many books that I could spend years reading and still not finish.
quote_zh: 那个巨大的图书馆有那么多书，我花几年时间都读不完。
ex_en: You have a vast ocean of potential inside you—explore it, and you'll discover talents you never knew.
ex_zh: 你的内心蕴藏着一片广阔的潜力之海——去探索它，你会发现从未了解的天赋。

def_en: Related to seeing or sight
quote_en: The visual instructions with pictures made it much easier to build the birdhouse.
quote_zh: 配有图片的视觉说明让搭建鸟屋变得容易多了。
ex_en: Create a visual of your dreams—a drawing, a collage, a list—and let it remind you where you're going.
ex_zh: 为你的梦想创造一个视觉呈现——一幅画、一张拼贴画、一份清单——让它提醒你前进的方向。
